article.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
article.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

headline: Oil Plunges 5% on Trump's Iran Deal Claim

article.title: Trump says Iran peace deal to be signed Sunday, contradicting Tehran
article.summary: Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe said a peace deal, which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, would likely send liquidity back to risk-on assets such as cryptocurrencies.

headline: Swiss Economy Hits 10M Population Inflection Point

article.title: Switzerland Asks If 10 Million People Is Where to Draw the Line
article.summary: A Swiss plebiscite Sunday on whether to impose a population ceiling is offering voters a choice that threatens to become their most consequential yet of the current century.

article.title: Mongolia Reaffirms One China Policy at Meeting, China Says
article.summary: Mongolian President Khurelsukh Ukhnaa said Mongolia firmly adheres to the One China principle in a meeting with China’s Foreign Minister Wang Yi in Ulaanbaatar on June 13, according to a statement from China’s Foreign Ministry.

headline: US Bans 2 Anthropic AI Models Overnight

article.title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Pull Claude Fable, Mythos AI Models
article.summary: Anthropic pushed back against what it described as an overreach, saying the vulnerability cited is already widespread across the industry.

headline: Google Sues China Hackers Over $100M Crypto Scam

article.title: Google Sues Chinese Crime Group for Allegedly Using Gemini AI for Mass Phishing Scams
article.summary: Google alleges a Chinese network weaponized its Gemini AI to create phishing sites that stole millions of credit card numbers and targeted crypto investors.

headline: Venice, Morpheus Tokens Surge 15% Amid Fable 5 Ban

article.title: Venice and Morpheus tokens climb as US ban on Anthropic’s Fable 5 fuels ‘permissionless AI’ pitch
article.summary: Venice founder Erik Voorhees and the official Morpheus account seized on the shutdown, casting it as proof of "permissionless" AI's use case.

headline: Millions of Bitcoin Exposed to Hackers via Reuse

article.title: Coinbase quantum report flags exchange cold wallets among millions of bitcoin exposed by address reuse
article.summary: The report lays out possible solutions to the abandoned coins problem, such as setting a deadline for migration and then freezing vulnerable coins.
